name: conductor-oss-workspace
author: Conductor Contributors
description: Markdown-native AI agent orchestrator — dispatch coding tasks from a kanban board

scripts.dev: sh -c 'APP_ROOT=$PWD; WORKSPACE_ROOT=${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE:-${WORKSPACE:-$APP_ROOT}}; ENV_FILE=${CONDUCTOR_ENV_FILE:-}; if [ -z "$ENV_FILE" ]; then if [ -f "$APP_ROOT/.env.local" ]; then ENV_FILE="$APP_ROOT/.env.local"; elif [ -f "$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.local" ]; then ENV_FILE="$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.local"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$ENV_FILE" ] && [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; CONFIG=${CO_CONFIG_PATH:-$WORKSPACE_ROOT/conductor.yaml}; CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE_ROOT CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_URL=${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:4749} bun run --cwd packages/web dev'
scripts.dev:backend: sh -c 'APP_ROOT=$PWD; WORKSPACE_ROOT=${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE:-${WORKSPACE:-$APP_ROOT}}; ENV_FILE=${CONDUCTOR_ENV_FILE:-}; if [ -z "$ENV_FILE" ]; then if [ -f "$APP_ROOT/.env.local" ]; then ENV_FILE="$APP_ROOT/.env.local"; elif [ -f "$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.local" ]; then ENV_FILE="$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.local"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$ENV_FILE" ] && [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; CONFIG=${CO_CONFIG_PATH:-$WORKSPACE_ROOT/conductor.yaml}; CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE_ROOT CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG bun run --cwd packages/cli dev -- start --workspace "$WORKSPACE_ROOT" --no-dashboard --backend-port ${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT:-4749}'
scripts.dev:full: sh -c 'APP_ROOT=$PWD; WORKSPACE_ROOT=${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE:-${WORKSPACE:-$APP_ROOT}}; ENV_FILE=${CONDUCTOR_ENV_FILE:-}; if [ -z "$ENV_FILE" ]; then if [ -f "$APP_ROOT/.env.local" ]; then ENV_FILE="$APP_ROOT/.env.local"; elif [ -f "$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.local" ]; then ENV_FILE="$WORKSPACE_ROOT/.env.local"; fi; fi; if [ -n "$ENV_FILE" ] && [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then set -a; . "$ENV_FILE"; set +a; fi; CONFIG=${CO_CONFIG_PATH:-$WORKSPACE_ROOT/conductor.yaml}; PORT=${PORT:-3000}; CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT=${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT:-4749}; CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE_ROOT CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG bun run --cwd packages/cli dev -- start --workspace "$WORKSPACE_ROOT" --backend-port $CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT --port $PORT'
scripts.prod:prepare: bun run --cwd packages/web build && cargo build -p conductor-cli --release
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/web clean && cargo clean
